title: Strolid AI and Marketing Strategy
summary: Michael Donovan discussed integrating Strolid AI with Viconic for an AI show in Amsterdam, emphasizing automation orchestration for a data-driven marketing team. He detailed a chatbot engagement model for custom reports and outlined rebuilding the marketing team for account-based strategies. Michael also introduced his BDC app to streamline dealer operations and empower client success with compliant campaigns and market scans.

decisions.description: Integrate Strolid AI with Viconic for an AI show in Amsterdam.
Rebuild Strolid marketing team to be data-driven with full visibility.
Transition marketing and sales from lead generation to account-based marketing.
Empower client success (Gus, Edwin) to use BDC app for campaigns and market scans.

actionItems.task: Complete BDC app fixes and send an invite to Jason Branham.

expectedOutcome.description: Jason receives an invite and can access the BDC app.

actionItems.task: Get with Reed to implement the tag manager for the Rainbow store.

expectedOutcome.description: Tag manager is correctly implemented for the Rainbow store.

actionItems.task: Inform everyone regarding next steps for analysis and automation.

expectedOutcome.description: Team is updated on analysis and automation progress.

contributions.description: Proposed integrating Strolid AI with Viconic for an Amsterdam AI show.
Emphasized that automation's power comes from orchestration, not just efficiency.
Proposed rebuilding the marketing team to be data-driven, transparent, and visible.
Detailed a chatbot engagement model for users to create custom reports.
Proposed shifting marketing and sales from lead generation to account-based strategies.
Introduced the BDC app he developed to streamline dealer operations.
Suggested empowering client success team members with the BDC app for campaigns.
Asked about the status of the tag manager for the Rainbow store.
Questioned the data sources for the BDC app's market scan feature.
Explained BDC app uses Google Places, Maps APIs, and US Census for market data.
Highlighted BDC app's features for co-op, compliance, and legal disclaimers.
Suggested using VIN Solutions API to bypass ADF for faster lead notifications.
